chapterTitle: Chapter 9: Device APIs — Permissions, Camera & Media

MCQs.question: Runtime permissions on mobile are requested:

options.text: When a feature needs them (camera, photos)
Explaining photo access to users on iOS

MCQs.question: If permission is denied, you should:

options.text: Provide fallback UI and a path to Settings if needed
Silently retry in an infinite loop
Media library / camera permissions per platform rules
A paid Apple certificate for dev
Open the app settings page for manual permission changes

MCQs.question: Camera vs image picker choice depends on:

options.text: Product UX: simple pick vs live camera experience

MCQs.question: Android permission model differs from iOS in that:

options.text: Details vary by OS version and vendor; test both
They are identical in every case

MCQs.question: Privacy Nutrition Labels / Data Safety require:

options.text: Accurate disclosure of data collection in stores
Ask when the user triggers the feature

ShortQuestions.question: Why must permission strings be clear and honest?
ShortQuestions.preferredAnswer: Stores and OS guidelines require **truthful** explanations; users deny **vague** requests—hurting **conversion** and **trust**.

ShortQuestions.question: What is a rationale screen before the OS dialog?
ShortQuestions.preferredAnswer: An **in-app** explanation framing **why** the feature needs access—shown **before** triggering `requestPermissionsAsync` to improve **accept rates**.

ShortQuestions.question: Why avoid unused permissions in app manifests?
ShortQuestions.preferredAnswer: **Review risk**, user **distrust**, and potential **rejection**—only declare what you use.

ShortQuestions.question: How does limited photo library access on iOS affect apps?
ShortQuestions.preferredAnswer: Users may grant **subset** access—handle **partial** selections and **re-prompt** flows per Apple APIs.

ShortQuestions.question: Name one Expo module for barcode scanning (conceptual).
ShortQuestions.preferredAnswer: Historically **`expo-barcode-scanner`** or camera-based modules depending on **SDK**—always follow **current** Expo docs for the installed version.
